## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between growthx.ai and Udemy to leverage skills trending data for content creation and insights.](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy has rich data on course popularity, consumption, and skills trends across various domains](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Opportunity to create compelling, skills-forward content that showcases Udemy's insights on evolving workforce needs](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Potential for an interactive, persona-based tool to guide users to relevant courses based on business goals](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Web development resources and timelines are a critical consideration for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)

## Topics

### Current Udemy Data Capabilities

  - [Global Skills Report: Showcases top surging business and technical skills](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Internal dashboard tracking course popularity, consumption, and trending skills](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)
  - [Data available on course topics, popularity, enrollments, instructors, and content hours](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Ability to segment data by roles, though limited](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)

### Content Creation Opportunities

  - [Blend Udemy's first-party data with AI trends to create original, compelling content](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Focus on providing context and insights around skills data, not just raw numbers](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Potential for "AI Pulse" series to track evolving skill landscapes across domains](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Create content that ties skills directly to business outcomes and project capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Visualization and Presentation Ideas

  - [Draw inspiration from HackerRank's engaging skills presentation formats](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Create visually appealing, easy-to-understand representations of Udemy's skill coverage](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Develop interactive elements allowing users to explore data by role or domain](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)

### Potential Interactive Tool Concept

  - [Allow users to select their domain/function and business goals](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Recommend relevant courses based on selected criteria](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Focus on project-forward approach, showing how skills translate to real-world applications](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Implementation Considerations

  - [Web development resources are constrained; need to assess feasibility with Krista/Geneva](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Consider alternatives if complex web development becomes a bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [Balance between creating compelling visuals and maintaining reasonable implementation timelines](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)

### Data Experimentation and Next Steps

  - [Veronika to send available data for initial experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Explore using LLMs to generate insights from raw data](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Create sample visualizations to gauge team reaction and refine direction](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to follow up with Krista regarding web development capabilities and timelines](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Veronika to send available skills/course data for initial experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [Explore creating a prototype or mock-up for team feedback](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Assess feasibility of interactive tool concept vs. static content approach](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Identify clear owners for different aspects of the project to improve engagement and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/dxJGQxoxundwyg_EhBoNHQRoyp5v67Le?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
